mapper.select:
SELECT ci.id, ci.course_code, ci.course_name, ci.teacher_id, su.real_name AS teacher_name, ci.location, ci.week_day, ci.start_time, ci.end_time, ci.status FROM course_info ci LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON su.id = ci.teacher_id WHERE 1 = 1
AND (ci.course_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ci.course_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND ci.status = #{status}
ORDER BY ci.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_info (course_code, course_name, teacher_id, location, week_day, start_time, end_time, status) VALUES (#{courseCode}, #{courseName}, #{teacherId}, #{location}, #{weekDay}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE course_info SET course_name = #{courseName}, teacher_id = #{teacherId}, location = #{location}, week_day = #{weekDay}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
